reviews.comment:
Es un hermoso lugar para parar a descansar. Lleno de árboles y siempre limpio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a beautiful place to stop and rest. Full of trees and always clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkb0lqYUl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Mi parada favorita cuando vuelvo de la costa y no hablemos de lo rico que son los quesos que venden en el puesto de productos regionales en la entrada. Sin lugar a duda, detención obligada en el regreso de las vacaciones.

(Translated by Google)
My favorite stop on my way back from the coast, and let's not even talk about how delicious the cheeses are that they sell at the regional products stand at the entrance. Without a doubt, a must-stop on the way back from vacation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0NzVhMEJREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y limpio, nada más que destacar

(Translated by Google)
Good service and clean, nothing else to highlight
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0OThmdjVBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Super clean bathrooms

reviews.comment:
Muy buen.lugar para una parada en la ruta. Excelente lugar para tomar unos mates,bajar con mascotas, etc. Los socios del ACA cargan los termos de agua caliente sin cargo

(Translated by Google)
A great place for a roadside stop. Excellent spot to enjoy some mate, bring your pets, etc. ACA members get free hot water refills for their thermoses.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0eTZ6alRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio
Riquísimo el cafe

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The coffee was delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0ODZuVXR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, muy seguro. Un lugar muy lindo, mucha limpieza y amabilidad. Cuenta con espacios increíbles al aire libre. Lo elijo siempre para parar aunque tenga que desviarme.

(Translated by Google)
Great service, very safe. A lovely place, very clean and friendly. It has amazing outdoor spaces. I always choose it as a stop, even if it means going out of my way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0aGYzSkJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Amplio, baño impecable ya que hay una persona de manera permanente limpiando.

(Translated by Google)
Spacious, spotless bathroom as there is a person permanently cleaning it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0a2NXdS1nRRAB

reviews.comment:

Excellent service and a very nice place to relax outdoors
